info.description: REST-only backend for catalog, checkout, orders, profile, admin, and notifications
info.title: Grip Store Backend REST API

post.description: Bulk imports card keys for a product
Creates or inserts a product from admin panel

patch.description: Updates user status or points from admin panel

post.description: Authenticate user and get JWT token
Revokes the provided refresh token for the current user

get.description: Returns current authenticated user profile and admin flag

post.description: Rotates refresh token and returns a new token pair

get.description: Returns the current announcement setting if configured
Lists public categories for product navigation
Lists active products visible to anonymous or signed-in users
Returns visible product detail and purchase metadata
Returns lightweight review metadata for purchase views
Searches active products visible to the actor
Lists public store settings used by the storefront
Handles payment provider redirect callback for storefront

post.description: Creates an order and reserves stock for checkout
Cancels a pending order and releases reserved stock

get.description: Recreates payment gateway params for an order
Polls payment and order lifecycle state

post.description: Creates a checkout order for direct payment flow

get.description: Calculates subtotal, points usage, and final payable amount

post.description: Creates a review for a delivered order

get.description: List tasks for the current user with optional filtering

post.description: Create a new task for the current user

patch.description: Change task status (todo -> in_progress -> done, or in_progress -> todo)

get.description: Show all translation history for current user

post.description: Creates a wishlist item for authenticated user
